mapper.select: SELECT * FROM consultation_notice ORDER BY is_top DESC, sort_order ASC, create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM consultation_notice WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY is_top DESC, sort_order ASC, create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM consultation_notice WHERE status = 1 AND is_top = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time DESC LIMIT 5
mapper.update: UPDATE consultation_notice SET view_count = IFNULL(view_count, 0) + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
